steps.title: Identify the start value
steps.content: The population was $4{,}000$ in 2011, so the model starts with the factor $4{,}000$ when $x=0$.

steps.title: Use the growth multiplier
steps.content:
A $7\%$ yearly increase means each year multiplies the previous population by:
$$1+0.07=1.07$$

steps.title: Write the exponential model
steps.content:
After $x$ years, the population model is:
$$p=4{,}000(1.07)^x$$
The answer is D.
